sections.paragraph:
Hadad H111
H1908
1. A successor of Husham as king of Edom. Vanquished the Midianites on the field of Moab
Gen 36:35; 1Ch 1:46
2. A son of Ishmael
- General references
1Ch 1:30
- Called Hadar
Gen 25:15
3. Successor of Baal-Hanan, king of Edom
- General references
1Ch 1:50
- Called Hadar
Gen 36:39
4. A prince of Edom, adversary of Solomon
1Ki 11:22; 1Ki 11:25
